nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public endpoint that HeyGen calls when an avatar render finishes. Validates HeyGen webhook signature (X-Heygen-Signature header) using HEYGEN_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Looks up video_renders by callback_id (we passed video_render_id as callback_id during render request), downloads MP4 from HeyGen URL, uploads to Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible), generates 16-char landing_page_token, marks status='ready', triggers B4 (delivery router). NOTE: Mary configures R2 credential as n8n 'AWS' credential type with custom endpoint = R2_ENDPOINT, region 'auto'. AWS S3 node handles SigV4 automatically — no manual signing in workflow.

nodes.name: Download MP4 from HeyGen
nodes.notes: Downloads MP4 binary into n8n binary slot 'data'. HeyGen URLs expire ~7 days; we copy to R2 immediately for permanent storage.

nodes.name: Upload to R2
nodes.notes: Mary configures n8n credential 'Cloudflare R2' as type 'AWS' with: Region='auto', Custom Endpoints=true, S3 endpoint=R2_ENDPOINT (https://<account>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com), Access Key=R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, Secret=R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY. n8n's awsS3 node handles SigV4 signing — no manual signing required.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ landing_page_token: $json.landing_page_token, landing_page_url: $json.landing_page_url, storage_provider: $json.storage_provider, storage_key: $json.storage_key, storage_url: $json.storage_url, duration_seconds: $json.duration_seconds, status: $json.status, rendered_at: $json.rendered_at }) }}

nodes.name: Trigger Delivery Router
nodes.notes: Fire-and-forget call to clx-video-delivery-router-v1. We don't block the HeyGen webhook response on delivery — HeyGen retries on non-200 within 3s.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, video_render_id: $('Build Patch').item.json.video_render_id, storage_url: $('Build Patch').item.json.storage_url, landing_page_url: $('Build Patch').item.json.landing_page_url }) }}
